metadata.name: verifarm
metadata.description: VeriFarm — Agricultural lending for East Africa smallholder farmers

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: USDC or stablecoin mint

accounts.name: vault
docs: Protocol USDC vault — signs via PDA seeds

accounts.name: farmer_token_account
docs: Farmer's USDC token account to receive funds

accounts.name: officer_entry
docs: Active loan officer must be registered

accounts.name: vault
docs: PDA-owned USDC vault — the vault PDA is its own SPL authority

accounts.name: oracle_entry
docs: Oracle must be registered and active in the OracleRegistry

accounts.name: field_officer
docs: Field officer minting the tag

accounts.name: officer_entry
docs: Officer entry must be active

accounts.name: officer
docs: Either admin OR active loan officer can update status

accounts.name: field_officer
docs: Field officer / loan officer who performed physical verification

errors.name: FarmerNotVerified
errors.msg: Farmer is not verified — complete KYC first

errors.name: RiskScoreExpired
errors.msg: Risk score has expired — oracle must resubmit

errors.name: RiskScoreTooLow
errors.msg: Risk score is too low for this loan amount

errors.name: UnauthorizedOracle
errors.msg: Risk score was submitted by an unauthorized oracle

errors.name: InvalidLoanState
errors.msg: Loan is not in the expected state for this operation

errors.name: LoanNotDefaulted
errors.msg: Loan is not yet past the due date — cannot liquidate

errors.name: AssetOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Asset does not belong to this farmer

errors.name: MerkleTreeFull
errors.msg: Merkle tree is full — create a new tree for livestock tags

errors.name: LoanAmountTooLarge
errors.msg: Loan amount exceeds maximum allowed for this risk tier

types.name: AdminConfig
docs: Singleton PDA — one per program deployment.
Holds the admin pubkey and oracle whitelist.

fields.name: farmer
docs: Farmer this asset belongs to

fields.name: asset_type
docs: Asset type

fields.name: description
docs: Human-readable description

fields.name: value_usd_cents
docs: Estimated value in USD cents (e.g., 150000 = $1,500.00)

fields.name: verified
docs: Verification status

fields.name: verified_by
docs: Field agent who verified (pubkey of the verifying officer)

fields.name: verified_at
docs: Timestamp of verification

fields.name: livestock_tag
docs: For livestock: the cNFT asset_id from Bubblegum (leaf hash)

fields.name: authority
docs: Wallet that owns this farmer account

fields.name: national_id_hash
docs: National ID hash (SHA-256, stored as bytes — never plaintext on-chain)

fields.name: full_name
docs: Full name (max 64 chars)

fields.name: phone
docs: Phone number for field agent contact

fields.name: location_lat
docs: GPS coordinates encoded as fixed-point (lat * 1e6, lng * 1e6)

fields.name: status
docs: Verification status

fields.name: loan_count
docs: Total loans taken (for credit history)

fields.name: on_time_repayments
docs: Total loans repaid on time

fields.name: latest_risk_score
docs: Latest risk score (cached from RiskScore PDA)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for PDA

fields.name: registered_at
docs: Unix timestamp of registration

fields.name: token_mint
docs: USDC mint (or other stablecoin)

fields.name: principal
docs: Principal in token base units

fields.name: outstanding
docs: Outstanding balance (principal + accrued interest)

fields.name: interest_bps
docs: Annual interest rate in basis points (e.g., 1500 = 15%)

fields.name: term_days
docs: Loan term in days

fields.name: status
docs: State machine

fields.name: risk_score_at_approval
docs: Risk score snapshot at approval time

fields.name: loan_index
docs: Loan index for this farmer (used in PDA seed)

types.name: LoanOfficerEntry
docs: One PDA per loan officer — allows fine-grained revocation.

types.name: OracleEntry
docs: One PDA per oracle — allows fine-grained revocation.

types.name: RiskScore
docs: Stores the latest AI risk score for a farmer, written by a trusted oracle.
Score expires after SCORE_VALIDITY_SECONDS — oracle must refresh before loan approval.

fields.name: score
docs: Score 0–100. Higher = less risky.

fields.name: confidence
docs: Confidence 0–100 from the AI model

fields.name: tier
docs: Risk tier derived from score

fields.name: oracle
docs: Oracle that submitted this score

fields.name: scored_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this score was computed

fields.name: model_version
docs: Model version string (e.g., "v2.1.0")

types.name: TagLivestockArgs
docs: Mints a compressed NFT (cNFT) via MPL Bubblegum to represent a livestock animal.
The leaf hash is stored in the Asset PDA for provenance tracking.
Bubblegum CPI requires the merkle tree, tree authority, log wrapper, and
account compression program — all passed as remaining accounts for flexibility
across different tree configurations.

fields.name: name
docs: Livestock metadata: name, species, ear tag number

fields.name: new_status
docs: Only a program admin can change status

fields.name: asset_index
docs: Unique index for this asset under this farmer (used in PDA seed)
